hasAttributes.name: queueId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the queue.

hasAttributes.name: businessUnitId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the business unit with which the queue is associated.

hasAttributes.name: organizationId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the organization associated with the queue.

hasAttributes.name: emailAddress
hasAttributes.description: Email address that is associated with the queue.

hasAttributes.name: primaryUserId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the owner of the queue.

hasAttributes.name: queueTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Type of queue that is automatically assigned when a user or queue is created. The type can be public, private, or work in process.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Name of the queue.

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: Description of the queue.

hasAttributes.name: queueSemantics
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the queue was created.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the queue record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who last modified the queue.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the queue was last modified.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version number of the queue.

hasAttributes.name: ignoreUnsolicitedEmail
hasAttributes.description: Information that specifies whether a queue is to ignore unsolicited email (deprecated).

hasAttributes.name: isFaxQueue
hasAttributes.description: Indication of whether a queue is the fax delivery queue.

hasAttributes.name: emailPassword
hasAttributes.description: This attribute is no longer used. The data is now in the Mailbox.Password attribute.

hasAttributes.name: incomingEmailDeliveryMethod
hasAttributes.description: Incoming email delivery method for the queue.

hasAttributes.name: emailUsername
hasAttributes.description: This attribute is no longer used. The data is now in the Mailbox.UserName attribute.

hasAttributes.name: outgoingEmailDeliveryMethod
hasAttributes.description: Outgoing email delivery method for the queue.

hasAttributes.name: allowEmailCredentials
hasAttributes.displayName: Allow to Use Credentials for Email Processing (Obsolete)
hasAttributes.description: This attribute is no longer used. The data is now in the Mailbox.AllowEmailConnectorToUseCredentials attribute.

hasAttributes.name: incomingEmailFilteringMethod
hasAttributes.description: Convert Incoming Email To Activities

defaultValue.displayText: Email messages in response to Dynamics 365 email
Email messages from Dynamics 365 Leads, Contacts and Accounts
Email messages from Dynamics 365 records that are email enabled

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the queue.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the business unit that owns the queue.

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns the queue.

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the queue.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the queue.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who last modified the queue.

hasAttributes.name: numberOfItems
hasAttributes.description: Number of Queue items associated with the queue.

hasAttributes.name: numberOfMembers
hasAttributes.description: Number of Members associated with the queue.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the team who owns the queue.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the currency associated with the queue.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Exchange rate for the currency associated with the queue with respect to the base currency.

hasAttributes.name: emailRouterAccessApproval
hasAttributes.description: Shows the status of the primary email address.

hasAttributes.name: defaultMailbox
hasAttributes.description: Select the mailbox associated with this queue.

hasAttributes.name: entityImageId
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: isEmailAddressApprovedByO365Admin
hasAttributes.displayName: Email Address O365 Admin Approval Status
hasAttributes.description: Shows the status of approval of the email address by O365 Admin.

hasAttributes.name: queueViewType
hasAttributes.description: Select whether the queue is public or private. A public queue can be viewed by all. A private queue can be viewed only by the members added to the queue.

definitions.description: A list of records that require action, such as accounts, activities, and cases.
